backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a portfolio backend that defines data types (BlogPost, Project, Skill, Lead, etc.) and CRUD operations for all entities, with access control and blob storage mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features that restore frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx and About.tsx to their exact Version 12 state, undoing changes from versions 13–16.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each page, component, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, plus base body and border styles.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite/React app that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application file that sets up TanStack Router with public and admin nested route layouts, lazy-loads all page components, and wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, rendering login or access-denied screens for unauthorized users and the protected children for admins.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Admin panel sidebar component that renders navigation links to all admin management sections, highlighting the active route based on the current pathname.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with navigation links, active social media icons fetched from the backend, a contact call-to-action, and a copyright line.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the Navigation, Footer, and ProfileSetup components inside a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides a login/logout button that uses Internet Identity authentication, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation bar with desktop and mobile menus, active-route highlighting, social links, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Shows a modal dialog prompting authenticated users without a profile to enter their name and optional email, then saves the profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively updates the document title and meta description tag based on per-page SEO settings fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts: Thin wrapper around useActor that exposes a typed call helper which guards against missing actors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing a React context provider and hook with login, logout, and status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including CRUD for blog posts, projects, services, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, social links, experiences, and user/admin management using a shared actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts) plus utility component classes like glow effects and gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying a developer profile card, stats, bio, values list, and links to contact/projects sections with SEO metadata.
Admin page for managing blog posts with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form that auto-generates slugs from titles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoriesManag: Admin page for managing project categories with CRUD operations, debounced search, pagination, and up/down reordering controls.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards (projects, blogs, leads, etc.) fetched via useGetDashboardStats and navigation cards linking to each admin section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExperienceManag: Admin page for managing work experience entries with CRUD operations, searchable/paginated list, and a form supporting dynamic responsibility bullet points.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Help.tsx: Admin help page that renders an accordion-based guide covering all admin panel sections such as projects, blog, SEO, and social links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact leads, with debounced search filtering and client-side pagination across a card-based list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for full CRUD management of portfolio projects, supporting drag-and-drop reordering, image uploads, category assignment, and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for creating, editing, and deleting per-page SEO settings (meta title and description), with debounced search and paginated card display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing services (title and description) with add/edit/delete via a dialog form, debounced search, and paginated card list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills with name, experience, and category fields, supporting create/edit/delete via dialogs, search filtering, and pagination.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SocialLinksMana: Admin page for managing social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X) with CRUD operations, search/pagination, toggle active state, and a dialog form for adding/editing links.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing testimonials with debounced search, pagination, and a dialog form for creating/editing testimonial entries (author and message fields).
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays all blog posts as cards with title, description, and date, with loading skeletons and navigation to individual post pages.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that finds a post by slug from the fetched posts list and renders its HTML content with SEO metadata, loading skeletons, and a not-found fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a lead submission form (name, email, message) and contact info cards for email, location, and response time, using toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Displays a timeline of professional work experiences fetched via `useGetExperiences`, showing job title, company, period, description, and responsibilities with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, tech stack showcase, FAQ accordion, and social links, with scroll-triggered animations and data fetched via `useGetSocialLinks`.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a home link and a back button for navigation recovery.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Portfolio projects page that fetches projects and categories, supports category filtering, and renders project cards with images, tags, and external links.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that fetches and displays professional service offerings in a card grid, with a live search filter and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page that groups fetched skills by category and renders each with a progress bar representing years of experience.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches and displays client/colleague feedback in a card grid with star ratings, quote text, and author name.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), extended color palette using OKLCH values (cyan, navy, semantic tokens), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 9) tracking a fix request to restore Home.tsx and About.tsx to their Version 12 state, along with a history of prior revert features covering all frontend source files.
